IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY NADIA REYNAGA-MORENO, LEGAL SUPPORT LEAD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: J. MURPHY. NOT REPORTED. (506)
